name: git-ci-operations
description: Host-neutral Git operations for goal framing, safe local changes, and shell automation. Pair with effective-delivery for pull requests, GitHub Actions, releases, and CI observation.

metadata.dailyDriver: Install for host-neutral goal framing, local Git hygiene, scoped staging, safe branching, and reusable shell automation.
metadata.notFor: Pull-request follow-through, GitHub Actions optimization, CI observation, releases, language-specific semantic review, or generic implementation TDD.
metadata.scope: Goal framing, local Git hygiene, scoped staging and commits, recovery boundaries, and shell-safe automation.
